message:
fix(freeze): Update emitCommonOpcode to handle both trampoline and SSA modes

Fixed all opcodes in emitCommonOpcode to use is_trampoline parameter:

Trampoline mode (is_trampoline = true):
  - Uses frame->result for exception handling
  - Uses next_block = -1 and break for control flow

SSA mode (is_trampoline = false):
  - Uses direct return for exceptions
  - No frame pointer needed

Changes:
- Fixed ~26 exception handling patterns to check is_trampoline
- Properly escaped braces in format strings containing conditionals
- Both emitTrampolineInstruction and emitInstruction can now safely
  call emitCommonOpcode with correct code generation

This completes the refactoring - all 133 shared opcodes now work
correctly in both execution modes.
